realm.name: Sponsor Admin
realm.description: Sponsor Administrator with full oversight over studies.

realm.name: CRA
realm.description: Clinical Research Associate responsible for monitoring sites.

realm.name: Data Manager
realm.description: Data Manager responsible for CDISC metadata and database locking.

realm.name: Site Investigator
realm.description: Site Investigator responsible for capturing patient EDC data.

realm.name: Auditor
realm.description: Auditor with read-only access to audit trails and eTMF.

realm.name: Monitor
realm.description: Clinical Monitor responsible for site monitoring and data verification.

realm.name: Grants Manager
realm.description: Grants Manager responsible for clinical trial budget and financial oversight.

realm.name: Subject
realm.description: Subject/Patient role restricted to diary/eCOA submissions.

realm.name: quality_manager
realm.description: Quality Manager responsible for CAPA review and deviation investigation.

realm.name: qa_lead
realm.description: Quality Assurance Lead with full oversight of deviations and CAPAs.

realm.name: quality_oversight
realm.description: Quality Oversight role with capability to approve and close CAPAs.
